name: Phil Hills
description: AI Systems Architect and creator of the Q Protocol and Identity Cube specification. Founder of A2AC LLC, building governed AI agent orchestration infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform.

authentication.credentials: Public agent card. Contact partnerships@a2ac.ai for authenticated endpoints.

skills.name: Identity Cube Consultation

skills.name: Q Protocol Design
skills.description: Design and architect Q Protocol implementations for enterprise agent coordination. Coordinate-based messaging that achieves 10x token reduction in multi-agent systems.

skills.name: GCP Agent Infrastructure
skills.description: Design and deploy AI agent infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform. Cloud Run, Vertex AI, Firestore, BigQuery audit trails, Pub/Sub messaging, and Terraform deployment.
